---
name: Feature request
about: An idea for something DisSysLab should do that it doesn't.
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

(What are you trying to accomplish? Not how you want to solve
it — what is the underlying need. Even if you think you know
the answer, state the problem first.)



## A concrete use case

(Which gallery office or which recipe would benefit? If none
today, who would use this and why?)



## Proposed solution

(How you would solve it, if you have one. Code sketches
welcome.)



## Alternatives you considered

(Either other implementation choices, or workarounds that don't
require a framework change.)



## Could this be a gallery office instead?

(The bar for adding a new framework feature is higher than for
adding a new gallery office. If this could be a gallery office,
please consider that path first.)
